◎简　　介  

　　James Brown sang in the ring for the Muhammed Ali fight vs Chuck Wepner and did a pre fight performance on screen in Rocky IV which starred Sylvestor Stallone who portrayed Rocky Balboa that inspired by Chuck Wepner.
